/usr/bin/ar qc libbmpi.a CMakeFiles/bmpi.dir/src/pi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmpi.dir/src/pi_imp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmpi.dir/src/pi_tables_imp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmpi.dir/src/pi_act_prof_imp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmpi.dir/src/pi_counter_imp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmpi.dir/src/pi_meter_imp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmpi.dir/src/pi_learn_imp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmpi.dir/src/pi_mc_imp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmpi.dir/src/pi_clone_imp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmpi.dir/src/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmpi.dir/src/action_helpers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmpi.dir/src/direct_res_spec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmpi.dir/src/group_selection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bmpi.dir/src/device_state.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libbmpi.a
